message:
fix(audit): Add export jobs Map cleanup to prevent memory leak

- bd-18ima: Export jobs Map was growing unbounded with no cleanup
- Add periodic cleanup interval (hourly) that removes expired jobs
- Clean up completed jobs after 24h expiry, failed/stale jobs after TTL
- Cap maximum jobs at 1000, evicting oldest when exceeded
- Add createdAt field to AuditExportResult for cleanup tracking
- Export helper functions for testing and monitoring:
  - stopExportJobCleanup() for test teardown
  - getExportJobCount() for monitoring
  - forceExportJobCleanup() for manual cleanup
- Use timer.unref() to not block process exit
- Add tests for cleanup functionality

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
